phrases.intent_en: Where is the UNESCO plaque located
phrases.cultural_note: The UNESCO plaque is modestly integrated into the column's base, not a large sign.

likely_response.translation_en: On the pedestal, on the south side.

responses.english: On the pedestal, on the south side.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I buy souvenirs near the column
phrases.text_local: Kde můžu koupit suvenýry u sloupu?
phrases.cultural_note: The square has several small kiosks selling local crafts and postcards.

likely_response.translation_en: The kiosks are on the corner of the square.

responses.english: The kiosks are on the corner of the square.

phrases.intent_en: How do I show respect at this religious monument
phrases.cultural_note: The column is an active pilgrimage site; quiet reverence is expected.

likely_response.local: Nemluvte nahlas a nešplhejte na sochy.
likely_response.translation_en: Don't speak loudly and don't climb on the statues.

responses.english: Don't speak loudly and don't climb on the statues.
responses.french: Nemluvte nahlas a nešplhejte na sochy.

phrases.intent_en: Are there guided tours that include this monument
phrases.text_local: Jsou nějaké prohlídky s průvodcem, které zahrnují tenhle sloup?
phrases.cultural_note: Tours are booked through the tourist information office, not on-site.

likely_response.local: Ano, začínají od radnice každou hodinu.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, they start from the town hall every hour.

responses.english: Yes, they start from the town hall every hour.
responses.french: Ano, začínají od radnice každou hodinu.
